notes:
Palette v0.27.0 introduces Palette as a built-in on-device agent and sharpens model defaults, tooltips, and chat history.

### New
- **On-device Palette agent** — run Palette as a first-class coding agent that works locally on your machine, no external provider required.
- **Local model library** — browse, download, and manage on-device models, with Palette handling the model server behind the scenes.
- **Palette in chat** — pick Palette from the agent picker and chat with it using a built-in local chat template.

### Improved
- **Model defaults** — set a default model in Settings and override it per tab, so each conversation starts with the model you want.

### Fixed
- **Cold-start guidance** — the "Help me get started" button now opens with the right onboarding guide.
- **Plan history** — plans from plan mode now stay visible when you revisit a session's history.
- **Tooltips** — tooltips now show the current title instead of an outdated cached one.
- **Clearer error messages** — Gemini history and list errors now report a readable message when something goes wrong.
